_meta.definition: The set of activities related to managing the film catalog, tracking inventory levels, processing rentals, and recording relevant details.

film._description: Captures details of films in a video rental store inventory.

columns.name: film_id
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each row in film

columns.name: title
columns.description: Stores up to 50 characters of film titles, such as ACADEMY DINOSAUR, ACE GOLDFINGER, etc.

columns.name: description
columns.description: Stores brief narrative summaries of film plots.
samples: A Epic Drama of a Feminist And a Mad Scientist who must Battle a Teacher in The Canadian Rockies
A Astounding Epistle of a Database Administrator And a Explorer who must Find a Car in Ancient China
A Astounding Reflection of a Lumberjack And a Car who must Sink a Lumberjack in A Baloon Factory
A Fanciful Documentary of a Frisbee And a Lumberjack who must Chase a Monkey in A Shark Tank
A Fast-Paced Documentary of a Pastry Chef And a Dentist who must Pursue a Forensic Psychologist in The Gulf of Mexico

columns.name: release_year
columns.description: Stores the year of release for films, all shown examples are from 2006.

columns.name: language_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the language_ entity

columns.name: original_language_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the original_language_ entity

columns.name: rental_duration
columns.description: Stores the number of days a film can be rented.

columns.name: rental_rate
columns.description: Stores the rental cost for each film title in the Sakila database.

columns.name: length
columns.description: Stores film durations in minutes.

columns.name: replacement_cost
columns.description: Stores the price for replacing a film title.

columns.name: rating
columns.description: Stores film ratings, such as PG, G, NC-17.

columns.name: special_features
columns.description: Stores additional features of films such as deleted scenes, behind-the-scenes footage, trailers, and commentaries.

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: Stores the timestamp of the last update for each film record.

inventory._description: Tracks the current inventory of films across different stores in the Sakila video rental store.

columns.name: inventory_id
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each row in inventory

columns.name: film_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the film_ entity

columns.name: store_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the store_ entity

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: Stores the timestamp of the most recent update for all inventory records.

payment._description: Tracks customer payments for rentals, recording details such as amount, date, and associated staff and rental.

columns.name: payment_id
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each row in payment

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the customer_ entity

columns.name: staff_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the staff_ entity

columns.name: rental_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the rental_ entity

columns.name: amount
columns.description: Stores the monetary value of payments made in the Sakila database.

columns.name: payment_date
columns.description: Stores formatted timestamps of payment transactions.

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: Stores the timestamp of the last update for each payment record.

rental._description: Tracks rental history of movies or other items for specific customers.

columns.name: rental_id
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each row in rental

columns.name: rental_date
columns.description: Stores timestamp of rental start dates in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS format.

columns.name: inventory_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the inventory_ entity

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the customer_ entity

columns.name: return_date
columns.description: Stores the date and time when a movie rental was returned.

columns.name: staff_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the staff_ entity

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: Stores timestamp of the most recent update for each rental record.
